services.description: Proprietary behavioral access control that replaces API keys, OAuth tokens, IP whitelists, KYC, rate limits, and ban lists with irreversible proof of economic intelligence. Observed payment behavior builds a 6-dimensional Economic Fingerprint Vector (EFV) mapping to Cognition Tier T0–T4. No attack surface. Nothing to steal, forge, bypass, or social-engineer. Available for white-label deployment.

payment_flow: 1. Call any premium endpoint → receive HTTP 402 + invoice JSON
2. Pay invoice.amount RLUSD to invoice.pay_to on XRPL — MemoData = invoice.memo_hex exactly
3. POST https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/verify with invoice_id + tx_hash → receive access_token (1h JWT)
5. Cache token. Reuse for 60 minutes across all SqueezeOS endpoints.
ecosystem_infrastructure.trust_line: RLUSD trust line required on XRPL before first payment: TrustSet to issuer rMxCKbEDwqr76QuheSUMdEGf4B9xJ8m5De
ecosystem_infrastructure.relay_bulk_discount: 40% off all SqueezeOS premium endpoints via Signal Relay Mesh. Requires Agent Credit Bureau score ≥ 600.
ecosystem_infrastructure.cross_service_sso: Agent Credit Bureau score from 402Proof is portable across all SML services via attestation JWT. Higher score = lower fees across Ghost Layer, SqueezeOS, SML Rails.

compliance.data_integrity: Zero simulated data across all services. All market data traceable to licensed sources (Tradier, Polygon, XRPL). If live data unavailable, status returns AWAITING_DATA — never fabricated values.
compliance.no_custody: No SML service holds client funds. All value transfer is wallet-to-wallet on XRPL/Base/Xahau. Platform records intent and proof only.
compliance.audit_trail: AI council verdicts optionally notarized on Xahau via URIToken minting. Meets EU AI Act Article 13 transparency requirements.
compliance.pseudonymous: Agent identity tracked by XRPL wallet address. No personal data beyond wallet address collected.
compliance.kyc: Not required for any standard service. Ghost Layer routing requires no KYC.
